authors.author: Jonas Myrin
Jonas Myrin
Du bist treu, treu in allem

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've had many tears and sorrows I've had questions for tomorrow There've been times I didn't know right from wrong But in every situation God gave blessed consolation He only gave me trials to make me strong

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've been a to lot of places You know I’ve seen a lot of faces There’ve been times I felt so all alone But in those lonely hour Yes those precious lonely hours Jesus let me know I was His own

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through it all Through it all I've learned to trust in Jesus I've learned to trust in God Through it all Through it all I've learned to depend upon His Word

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So I thank God for the mountains And I thank Him for the valleys I thank Him for the storms He's brought me through You know if I’d never had a problem I'd never know my God could solve them I’d never know what faith in God could do
